display.markdownStr: 本月ECS按量付费账单为${m}元，转换成包年包月最多可节省${saved}元。

search.query: source:bill and ProductCode:ecs and Item: PayAsYouGoBill  |select round(m,3) as m ,round(m*0.7,3) as saved from( select coalesce(sum(PretaxAmount),0) as m from log )

display.markdownStr: 本月RDS按量付费账单为<font color="red">${m}</font>元，转换成包年包月最多可节省${saved}元。

search.query: source:bill and ProductCode:RDS and Item: PayAsYouGoBill  |select round(m,3) as m,round(m*0.36,3) as saved from( select coalesce(sum(PretaxAmount),0) as m from log )

display.markdownStr: 本月SLS按量付费账单为${m}元，购买资源包最多可节省${saved}元，资源包[购买地址](https://common-buy.aliyun.com/?spm=5176.8064714.323065.pricedetail1111.5976X22GX22GM0&commodityCode=slsbag&request=%7B%22region%22%3A%22china-common%22%7D#/buy)。

search.query: source:bill and ProductCode:SLS and Item: PayAsYouGoBill  |select round(m,3) as m ,round(m*0.15,3) as saved from( select coalesce(sum(PretaxAmount),0) as m from log )

source: instance_bill and ProductCode:oss   and BillingItem: "标准存储(本地冗余)容量"  | select "资源包规格" , case when "1月包节省费用"< 0 then 0 else "1月包节省费用" end  as "1月包节省费用", case when "6月包节省费用"< 0 then 0 else "6月包节省费用" end  as "6月包节省费用", case when "一年包节省费用"< 0 then 0 else "一年包节省费用" end  as "一年包节省费用"  from( select size as "资源包规格", PretaxAmount - (ondemand+m1) as "1月包节省费用", PretaxAmount - (ondemand+m6/6) as "6月包节省费用", PretaxAmount - (ondemand+m12/12) as "一年包节省费用"  from (select size,  PretaxAmount ,ondemand,m1 ,m6,m12, usage/24 as Usage  from( select size, sum(ondemand) as ondemand, sum(PretaxAmount) as PretaxAmount ,avg(usage) as usage, arbitrary(m1) as m1, arbitrary(list_price),arbitrary(m6) as m6, arbitrary(m12) as m12 from(   select t, case when usage > size*24 then (usage-size*24)*0.000167 else 0  end  as ondemand,PretaxAmount,size,m1,m6,m12 ,list_price,usage  from (select date_trunc('day',__time__) as t, sum(Usage) as usage ,sum(PretaxAmount) as PretaxAmount from log  group by t order by t ) join (select * from (values(0,0,0,0,0),(40,4.8,1,5,9), (100,12,11,55,99), (500,60,54,270,486), (1024,122.88,111,555,999), (2048,245.76,221,1105,1989), (5120,614.4,553,2765,4977), (10240,1228.8,1106,5530,9954), (20480,2457.6,2212,11060,19908), (30720,3686.4,3318,16524,29862), (51200,6144,5530,27650,49770), (71680,8601.6,7742,38556,69678), (102400,12288,11059,55295,99531), (153600,18432,16590,82618,149310), (204800,24576,22118,110590,199062), (307200,36864,33178,165890,298602), (512000,61440,55296,276480,497664)) as t(size,list_price, m1,m6,m12)) on 1=1) group by size) order by size) )
search.tokenQuery: source: instance_bill and ProductCode:oss   and BillingItem: "标准存储(本地冗余)容量"  | select "资源包规格" , case when "1月包节省费用"< 0 then 0 else "1月包节省费用" end  as "1月包节省费用", case when "6月包节省费用"< 0 then 0 else "6月包节省费用" end  as "6月包节省费用", case when "一年包节省费用"< 0 then 0 else "一年包节省费用" end  as "一年包节省费用"  from( select size as "资源包规格", PretaxAmount - (ondemand+m1) as "1月包节省费用", PretaxAmount - (ondemand+m6/6) as "6月包节省费用", PretaxAmount - (ondemand+m12/12) as "一年包节省费用"  from (select size,  PretaxAmount ,ondemand,m1 ,m6,m12, usage/24 as Usage  from( select size, sum(ondemand) as ondemand, sum(PretaxAmount) as PretaxAmount ,avg(usage) as usage, arbitrary(m1) as m1, arbitrary(list_price),arbitrary(m6) as m6, arbitrary(m12) as m12 from(   select t, case when usage > size*24 then (usage-size*24)*0.000167 else 0  end  as ondemand,PretaxAmount,size,m1,m6,m12 ,list_price,usage  from (select date_trunc('day',__time__) as t, sum(Usage) as usage ,sum(PretaxAmount) as PretaxAmount from log  group by t order by t ) join (select * from (values(0,0,0,0,0),(40,4.8,1,5,9), (100,12,11,55,99), (500,60,54,270,486), (1024,122.88,111,555,999), (2048,245.76,221,1105,1989), (5120,614.4,553,2765,4977), (10240,1228.8,1106,5530,9954), (20480,2457.6,2212,11060,19908), (30720,3686.4,3318,16524,29862), (51200,6144,5530,27650,49770), (71680,8601.6,7742,38556,69678), (102400,12288,11059,55295,99531), (153600,18432,16590,82618,149310), (204800,24576,22118,110590,199062), (307200,36864,33178,165890,298602), (512000,61440,55296,276480,497664)) as t(size,list_price, m1,m6,m12)) on 1=1) group by size) order by size) )

display.markdownStr:
本月OSS标准存储(本地冗余)存储空间为${usage}GB ,按量付费账单为${pretaxamount}元
若购买资源包，可节省的费用如下(若节省费用出现负值，代表您已享受最佳折扣，无需购买资源包):

1月包建议购买${size_m1}GB规格， 每月可节省${max_m1}元，

半年包建议购买${size_m6}GB规格，每月可节省${max_m6}元

整年包建议购买${size_m12}GB规格，每月可节省${max_m12}元。

资源包[购买地址](https://common-buy.aliyun.com/?spm=5176.8064714.323065.pricedetail1111.5976X22GX22GM0&commodityCode=ossbag&request=%7B%22region%22%3A%22china-common%22%7D#/buy)。

search.query: source: instance_bill and ProductCode:oss   and BillingItem: "标准存储(本地冗余)容量"  |select round(arbitrary(PretaxAmount),3) as pretaxamount , round(arbitrary(usage),3) as usage ,max_by(size, saved_m1) as size_m1, round(max(saved_m1),3) as max_m1  ,max_by(size, saved_m6) as size_m6, round(max(saved_m6),3) as max_m6  ,max_by(size, saved_m12) as size_m12, round(max(saved_m12),3) as max_m12    from(  select *, PretaxAmount - (ondemand+m1) as saved_m1, PretaxAmount - (ondemand+m6/6) as saved_m6, PretaxAmount - (ondemand+m12/12) as saved_m12  from (select size,  PretaxAmount ,ondemand,m1 ,m6,m12, usage/24 as Usage  from( select size, sum(ondemand) as ondemand, sum(PretaxAmount) as PretaxAmount ,avg(usage) as usage, arbitrary(m1) as m1, arbitrary(list_price),arbitrary(m6) as m6, arbitrary(m12) as m12 from(   select t, case when usage > size*24 then (usage-size*24)*0.000167 else 0  end  as ondemand,PretaxAmount,size,m1,m6,m12 ,list_price,usage  from (select date_trunc('day',__time__) as t, sum(Usage) as usage ,sum(PretaxAmount) as PretaxAmount from log  group by t order by t ) join (select * from (values(0,0,0,0,0),(40,4.8,1,5,9), (100,12,11,55,99), (500,60,54,270,486), (1024,122.88,111,555,999), (2048,245.76,221,1105,1989), (5120,614.4,553,2765,4977), (10240,1228.8,1106,5530,9954), (20480,2457.6,2212,11060,19908), (30720,3686.4,3318,16524,29862), (51200,6144,5530,27650,49770), (71680,8601.6,7742,38556,69678), (102400,12288,11059,55295,99531), (153600,18432,16590,82618,149310), (204800,24576,22118,110590,199062), (307200,36864,33178,165890,298602), (512000,61440,55296,276480,497664)) as t(size,list_price, m1,m6,m12)) on 1=1) group by size) order by size))

search.query: source: instance_bill and ProductCode:oss   and BillingItem: "低频访问(本地冗余)/归档存储容量" and InstanceID: archive |select round(arbitrary(PretaxAmount),3) as pretaxamount , round(arbitrary(usage),3) as usage ,max_by(size, saved_m1) as size_m1, round(max(saved_m1),3) as max_m1  ,max_by(size, saved_m6) as size_m6, round(max(saved_m6),3) as max_m6  ,max_by(size, saved_m12) as size_m12, round(max(saved_m12),3) as max_m12    from(  select *, PretaxAmount - (ondemand+m1) as saved_m1, PretaxAmount - (ondemand+m6/6) as saved_m6, PretaxAmount - (ondemand+m12/12) as saved_m12  from (select size,  PretaxAmount ,ondemand,m1 ,m6,m12, usage/24 as Usage  from( select size, sum(ondemand) as ondemand, sum(PretaxAmount) as PretaxAmount ,avg(usage) as usage, arbitrary(m1) as m1, arbitrary(list_price),arbitrary(m6) as m6, arbitrary(m12) as m12 from(   select t, case when usage > size*24 then (usage-size*24)*list_price else 0  end  as ondemand,PretaxAmount,size,m1,m6,m12 ,list_price,usage  from (select date_trunc('day',__time__) as t, sum(Usage) as usage ,sum(PretaxAmount) as PretaxAmount, avg(ListPrice) as list_price from log  group by t order by t ) join (select * from ( values (0,0,0,0,0), (100,3.3,3,15,27), (500,16.5,15,75,135), (1024,33.792,30,149,270), (2048,67.584,61,304,549), (5120,168.96,152,757,1368), (10240,337.92,304,1514,2736), (20480,675.84,608,3028,5472), (51200,1689.6,1521,7575,13689), (102400,3379.2,3041,15144,27369), (204800,6758.4,6083,30293,54747), (204800,6758.4,9124,45438,82116), (512000,16896,15206,75726,136854)) as t(size,list_price1, m1,m6,m12)) on 1=1) group by size) order by size))

search.query: source: instance_bill and ProductCode:oss   and BillingItem: "低频访问(本地冗余)/归档存储容量"  and   InstanceID: IA |select round(arbitrary(PretaxAmount),3) as pretaxamount , round(arbitrary(usage),3) as usage ,max_by(size, saved_m1) as size_m1, round(max(saved_m1),3) as max_m1  ,max_by(size, saved_m6) as size_m6, round(max(saved_m6),3) as max_m6  ,max_by(size, saved_m12) as size_m12, round(max(saved_m12),3) as max_m12    from(  select *, PretaxAmount - (ondemand+m1) as saved_m1, PretaxAmount - (ondemand+m6/6) as saved_m6, PretaxAmount - (ondemand+m12/12) as saved_m12  from (select size,  PretaxAmount ,ondemand,m1 ,m6,m12, usage/24 as Usage  from( select size, sum(ondemand) as ondemand, sum(PretaxAmount) as PretaxAmount ,avg(usage) as usage, arbitrary(m1) as m1, arbitrary(list_price),arbitrary(m6) as m6, arbitrary(m12) as m12 from(   select t, case when usage > size*24 then (usage-size*24)*list_price else 0  end  as ondemand,PretaxAmount,size,m1,m6,m12 ,list_price,usage  from (select date_trunc('day',__time__) as t, sum(Usage) as usage ,sum(PretaxAmount) as PretaxAmount, avg(ListPrice) as list_price from log  group by t order by t ) join (select * from (values (0,0,0,0,0), (100.00,15.00,7.20,35.86,64.80), (500.00,75.00,36.00,179.28,324.00), (1024.00,153.60,73.70,367.03,663.30), (2048.00,307.20,147.40,734.05,1326.60), (5120.00,768.00,368.50,1835.13,3316.50), (10240.00,1536.00,737.00,3670.26,6633.00), (20480.00,3072.00,1474.00,7340.52,13266.00), (51200.00,7680.00,3685.00,18351.30,33165.00), (102400.00,15360.00,7370.00,36702.60,66330.00), (204800.00,30720.00,14740.00,73405.20,132660.00), (204800.00,30720.00,22110.00,110107.80,198990.00), (512000.00,76800.00,36850.00,183513.00,331650.00)) as t(size,list_price1, m1,m6,m12)) on 1=1) group by size) order by size))
